## Tags
agreement, charity, help, deal, terms, emotion, together, handshake

## Categories
emoji, account, security

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/heart-handshake)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::HeartHandshake;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        HeartHandshake { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
